# ReefTotem

ReefTotem is the AI software brand of 深圳前海瑞孚图腾科技有限公司.

Official website: https://reeftotem.ai/
Company: 深圳前海瑞孚图腾科技有限公司
Contact: contact@reeftotem.ai

## Primary Pages

- Home: https://reeftotem.ai/
- Products: https://reeftotem.ai/products
- Xingban Assistant: https://reeftotem.ai/assistant
- About: https://reeftotem.ai/about
- Download center: https://reeftotem.ai/downloads
- Account wallet: https://reeftotem.ai/billing
- Contact: https://reeftotem.ai/contact

## Product Directions

- OPC enterprise platform for customer workspaces, AI company creation, digital employees, project delivery, logs and review.
- Xingban Assistant 1.0 desktop AI entry for chat, memory, reminders, activity records and local-first workflows. The macOS Apple Silicon DMG is available from the download center.
- QuantAgent automatic quantitative system for strategy research, evidence gates, risk control and automation. It will be published from the same download center after completion.
- Account wallet and Billing Core provide unified top-up, subscription, wallet ledger, entitlement checks and usage-based credit reservation for OPC, Xingban Assistant and QuantAgent.
- Company-level delivery standards: real screenshots, real product status, explicit download links and clear boundaries for unreleased capabilities.

Download URL: https://reeftotem.ai/downloads/Xingban-Assistant-1.0.0-aarch64.dmg

ReefTotem does not make investment return promises. Product pages and documentation describe software capabilities, deployment boundaries, auditability and support paths.
